diagrams.title: Linear Queue Array Representation
diagrams.description: Shows how elements are stored in a linear queue using array with front and rear pointers
elements: front pointer pointing to first element
rear pointer pointing to last element
Direction arrows showing enqueue at rear, dequeue at front
diagrams.purpose: Understanding array-based queue storage and pointer manipulation

diagrams.title: Circular Queue Operations
diagrams.description: Depicts circular queue with front and rear wrapping around using circular arrangement
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how circular queue reuses space through wrap-around mechanism

diagrams.title: Queue Operations Flow
diagrams.description: Step-by-step visualization of enqueue and dequeue operations on a queue
elements: After enqueue operations showing front and rear
After dequeue operations showing front movement
Demonstration of overflow and underflow conditions
diagrams.purpose: Understanding sequential behavior of queue operations and state changes

diagrams.title: Linked Queue Implementation
diagrams.description: Shows linked list representation of queue with front and rear pointers
elements: Node structure with data and next pointer
diagrams.purpose: Understanding dynamic queue implementation using linked list pointers
